description: Gitee work overview via the GraphQL API of your logged-in session (session bridge — no API token). Auto-discovered from gitee.com by Claude Code: the modern Gitee web app uses POST /graphql with a session cookie + x-csrf-token header (NOT the /api/v5 REST API). Read-only queries below are verified against a live logged-in session; extend with more operations as needed.

tools.name: gitee_my_dashboard
tools.description: Your Gitee work overview: counts + your 5 most recent projects, assigned/created issues, and pull requests. GraphQL 'dashboard' operation.

params.name: query
params.description: Fixed GraphQL query — do not change.
